title: Machine-Vote-Gun-Chan!
description: Some of my dumb ideas for 23w13a_or_b
body:
# Machine-Vote-Gun-Chan!

My entry for **FlashFest A or B**, running on Minecraft *23w13a_or_b*, the April Fool snapshot.

This is a combination of my dumb ideas including:

* Proposals (as items)
  * They can be assigned to a random pending proposal by presidents
  * The proposal assigned to can be triggered with a right click by anyone
  * You can (not) shoot them as arrows
* A new proposal that (probably) produces more proposals on triggered

Have fun anyway!
